text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Vodka has entered her senior year. It's another
chance for her to discover new things that make
her cool. To welcome the new year, the two of us
visit a shrine.

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
C'mon. I don't mind doin' stuff for the new year...
but did we really have to come here?

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
Just don't expect me to go prayin' to the gods for
success like some loser.

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text: In fact, the gods should be the ones prayin' to me!

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
Wh-why do ya always gotta ask about every little
thing? I'm just pumpin' myself up! Gettin' fired up!
choice_data_list: So you don't have any wishes?

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
Well, I wouldn't say that... but it's not like the
gods are gonna make it come true.

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text: Hm? But now that I think about it, there's actually someone who can grant wishes right here.

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
Listen up, Trainer! I've got one wish for you! Make
me one level cooler.

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
Hm... To put it simply... Make me like a huge
motorcycle!

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text: I wanna race like vrooooom! and go wham! and stuff like that!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
That's not putting it simply at all. So what she's
saying is...

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text: Yeah! That! Big motorcycles have big gas tanks!

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
I wanna be like a big bike that never runs out of
gas. You know how to make that happen?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I think of just the right place to help keep her gas
tank full. Once we arrive...

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
Oh, a burger shop. I get it, we're gonna eat! Who
wants to eat stuffy traditional New Year's food
anyway?

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
I'll have some nuggets and wash 'em down with
cola! Calories? The more the better!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Vodka gobbles up everything she gets her hands
on. If she can eat this much, she'll never have to
worry about running her tank empty.

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
Yeah! That's it! Big motorcycles with high
emissions tear up any road you put 'em on.

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
I want that kind of brute force. You know how to
make that happen?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I figure out the perfect place to bring her. Once
we arrive...

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
Oh, an evening swim?! That's a good idea. Some
time in the water'll help pump up my lung
capacity!

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
And since no one's here this late, I can make some
serious waves. No holding back!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Vodka tears around the empty pool like a shark.
Her physical capabilities seem to improve as a
result.

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
A sidecar? I guess some of the really big ones do
usually have one.

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
You can cram a bunch of stuff in it, which seems
pretty convenient. I wish I had that kind of
storage...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
When I think of cramming, only one place comes
to mind. Once we arrive...

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text: Th-the library?! Don't tell me you're tryin' to cram knowledge into me?!

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
C-cut it out already. I don't have the storage for
that! This isn't my—waaah!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
We spend the New Year's break studying. I think
she's managed to cram a good deal of knowledge
into her head.
